rows.label: xs00050100_MSG0001
rows.name:
When the White Whale broke apart, many
pods were thrown out just like this one[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00050100_MSG0002
rows.name: You could say you were one of the lucky ones.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00050100_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh, right... you don't remember
the White Whale, do you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00050100_MSG0004
rows.name:
The White Whale is the nickname for the Earth
escape ship L-002. Do you remember Earth?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00050100_MSG0005
rows.name: Your[ST:wide ]― wait, no, our home planet.[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00050100_MSG0005_2
rows.name:
Or maybe I should say, it
used to be our home planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00050100_MSG0006
rows.name:
Earth got caught in the middle of a
massive battle between two alien groups[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00050100_MSG0009
rows.name:
Don't force it. You'll remember
things little by little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00050100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Still, this doesn't look like
the time to take it easy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs00050100_MSG0011
rows.name:
This place isn't paradise. We have to
fight the enemies that come after us.[ST:wait ]
